arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola ridicules Jamie Carragher’s bizarre Erling Haaland claim
arts.sum: On top of that, Jamie Carragher accused Erling Haaland of deliberately skipping the Real Madrid game out of fear of facing Antonio Rudiger . Haaland remains a fitness doubt for Sunday’s visit of Liverpool, a crucial game in City' season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool told rival player ‘would be a great signing’ to replace Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has attracted a lot of criticism for his performances since joining the club and the Reds have now been urged to replace him with Alexander Isak. Former Liverpool defender John Arne Riise feels that Liverpool need a clinical presence upfront, and Nunez has not been able to prove his quality so […] The post Liverpool told rival player ‘would be a great signing’ to replace Darwin Nunez appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland makes sneaky Arsenal dig as Man City star reignites feud
arts.sum: Erling Haaland liked a post on social media aiming a jibe at Arsenal following their West Ham defeat.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star needed 'injection and needles' to face Man City
arts.sum: The grit and determination of Real Madrid's Federico Valverde was evidenced during the Champions League clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Haaland ignites Arsenal feud with social media dig
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has ignited his feud with Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly following the 18-year-old’s red card against West Ham United. Lewis-Skelly memorably performed Haaland’s celebration after scoring his first Arsenal goal during the Gunners’ 5-1 win over Man City in early February, and the Norwegian has now hit back following the 18-year-old’s red card.
